title: Vanna Nilave Song Lyrics Ninaithen Vanthai
stanzas:
Vanna nilave vanna nilave
varuvadhu neethaanaa
vaasanaigal varugirathe
varuvadhu nijamthaanaa

oru nooru nilavin
velicham paathen un kannil
adi kodi puraakkal
koottam kanden
en nenjil

kanmoodinaal un niyabagam
poo pookkudhe en vaalibal

Vanna nilave vanna nilave
varuvadhu neethaanaa
vaasanaigal varugirathe
varuvadhu nijamthaanaa

Kangal ariyaa kaatrai pole
kanvil ennai thazhuviyathenna
paadhi iravil thookkathai
kalaikkum poove undhan
mugavari enna

ninaivodu thanthai ellaam
nijamaaga tharuvaaya
uyirukku uyirai thandhu
uravaada varuvaayaa

Koonthal kaattil
vazhi theriyaamal
maatik konden en vazhi enna

unnai ingae thaedi thaedi
tholaindhu ponen
en gadhi enna.

mazhai megam naan aanaal
un vaasal varuvene
un meedhu mazhai aagi
en jeevan nenaivene

kanavodu vanthaai penne
neril vara pozhudhillaiyo
thavam podhavillai endren
dhevathai varavillaiyo

enrichedMetadata.faq:
Frequently Asked Questions

What is the meaning of the song?

The song expresses deep romantic feelings and nostalgia, reflecting on beautiful memories associated with love.

In which movie is this song featured?

Vanna Nilave is featured in the movie Ninaithen Vanthai.

Who is the singer of this song?

The song is sung by the talented Hariharan.

Who composed the music for this song?

The music for Vanna Nilave was composed by Deva.

When was this song released?

This song was released in 1998.
enrichedMetadata.summary: In Vanna Nilave, the protagonist reminisces about love and the memories that linger in their heart. The song beautifully captures the essence of longing and affection, making it a perfect fit for romantic occasions. With its soothing melody and heartfelt lyrics, it evokes a sense of nostalgia that resonates with listeners. This classic piece from Ninaithen Vanthai remains a cherished favorite among fans of Tamil music.
enrichedMetadata.high_ctr_intro: Vanna Nilave from Ninaithen Vanthai is a timeless melody that captures the essence of love and nostalgia. With Hariharan's soulful vocals and Deva's enchanting composition, this song resonates deeply with anyone who has experienced the beauty of romance. Dive into the lyrical magic and let the soothing tunes transport you to a world of cherished memories.
stanzaMeanings: The colorful moon is coming; is it your fragrance that is arriving? Is it really true?
I saw a hundred moonlights; I saw a gathering of your eyes in my heart.
With your memory, flowers bloom in my life.
The colorful moon is coming; is it your fragrance that is arriving? Is it really true?
Like the wind that knows the eyes, what will embrace me in your gaze? What is your face that can remove the burden of my night?
Your face shines softly like a full moon, without any light.
Don't let my life slip away without even saying your name.
Will memories give life to everything? Will relationships come by giving life to life?
I lost my way without knowing the path in the thicket; what is my direction?
I searched for you here and there, what is my fate?
Though I am the rain cloud, I will come to your door; I will think of my life as rain on you.
You came with a dream, but is there no time to come to the earth? Is there no grace from my goddess?
